goal: Add a side-effect-free PR receipt intake report that normalizes manual PR review receipts and evaluates them through BPK-023 without calling GitHub, opening PRs, merging, or changing workflows.
scope_out: Do not call GitHub, create PRs, merge, change workflows, change package files, or mutate external state.
Do not change BPK-016 or BPK-023 semantics.
claims: Manual PR receipts can be normalized and reported without GitHub access.
Required PR receipt coverage blocks merge readiness when incomplete.
assumptions: Receipts are supplied by an operator or later connector.
dod: The report includes normalization summary, consolidation result, coverage, blockers, review items, and report lines.
Focused tests cover ready merge, incomplete coverage, and quarantined receipt review.
Review packet and anchors record the result.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, workflow changes, package changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-023 composed branch sequencing and PR review receipts. BPK-027 may add an intake report around manual receipts without external side effects.
